_help: Registered shared-surface definitions for the combined-scenario review gate. See docs/review-workflow.md and docs/case-study-compound-regression.md. When two or more tasks in Agents/TODO/Active/ declare the same `surface` key in their front-matter, review_gate.py requires the combined review file declared here to exist and pass keyword + line-count validation. Add surfaces after observed multi-task overlap; do not add prophylactically.

_schema.key: string — unique surface identifier (referenced by tasks via 'Surface: <key>')
_schema.review-file: string — path relative to project root, e.g. 'Agents/Review-reports/example-combined-review.md'
_schema.minimum-lines: int — minimum non-blank lines required in the combined review (default 40)
_schema.required-keywords: list[string] — case-insensitive keywords that must appear in the review body

_example_entry.description: Functions that share state on the rebalance tick. Combined review required when multiple tasks touch them.
